name: Online legalization information system
desc: Lecture research about web-based legalization application to make it easier for alumni who are far from campus locations
overview: Legalization is one of the administrative activities needed, especially for alumni. however, for alumni who live far from the campus location, it will be difficult if they have to come to do the legalization. This system aims to make it easier for alumni who want to legalize only with softcopy and documents that have been legalized will be sent to the alumni address

name: Jama'ah
desc: Web-based visit administrative application for Pusat Kajian Hadits institution
overview: Changed administration from paper media to software. Besides saving more space, it also saves time. In the visit administration system, the user can record the need to welcome guests and the system will report on several visit records

name: Spot On
desc: A platform for finding and renting places
overview: This platform functions as an information intermediary between the owner of the area/place and prospective tenants. From the owner's point of view, it will be easier to share information about the place to be rented, and the tenant can find a suitable place to rent with an illustration of calculating prices.

name: Bookita
desc: A platform for reading fiction and finding books you want to find
overview: This project is a startup competition project that aims to increase interest in reading. On this platform, users can share fiction and non-fiction stories that can be read by anyone

name: Dimerco Hokindo
desc: Web-based company profile of PT Dimerco Hokindo
overview: PT Dimerco Hokindo is a company engaged in the logistics sector

name: Teknonomi Media
desc: Web-based news portal for information about technology and economy
overview: Teknonomi is a news portal that provides information on technology and economic developments

name: Opmawa Management Information System
overview: Management Information System (SIM) is a system that can provide information in the form of reports and displays to business people. The system serves as a media that can be used as a connector for communication between business people. Jakarta State University has a Student Organization which is called a small government laboratory on campus called the Student Government Organization (Opmawa). Opmawa is an organization that has a system that is a reflection of the existing government system in Indonesia. In this research a needs analysis is carried out based on managerial problems in Opmawa which will later be developed into a system that can assist in the data collection and processing of the organizations internal data.

name: SiKerja
desc: Web-based job search platform to find available vacancies
overview: SiKerja is a trial website to get a list of jobs available on the jobstreet.com website

name: Epicor Support
desc: Developing and customize Epicor ERP function
overview: Epicor is end-to-end applications and B2B SaaS thats provides enterprise resource planning (ERP), customer relationship management (CRM), supply chain management (SCM), and human capital management (HCM) software to business customers in both software as a service (SaaS) and on-premises deployment models.

name: Eska Unggul Indonesia
desc: Web-based company profile and publication of Eska Unggul Indonesia
overview: 'Eska Unggul Indonesia' is a foundation located in Brebes Regency, Indonesia. 'Eska Unggul Indonesia' has a goal in village development with development and maintenance programs in the fields of education, economy, health, and social. On this website, consists of information about the foundation's activities and vacancies as volunteers

name: Recruitment Selection Information System (RSIS)
overview: Information system to assist the recruitment and selection process of prospective employees such as publication of job advertisements, psychological tests, to selection of applicant data

name: CAPA
desc: Corrective and preventive action administration system
overview: Information systems for taking corrective and preventive actions consist of improvements to organizational processes that are taken to eliminate the causes of nonconformities or other undesirable situations.

name: Maintenance H&P
desc: Administrative system for resource use and valuation
overview: Information system for recording the use of data sources, evaluating employee performance, ticketing issues, etc.

name: CHAKA
overview: Chaka is a management system for human resources (HR) in carrying out work such as matters related to employment, finance, time management, organization, etc.
